subprocessors.name: Zerops
subprocessors.purpose: Primary cloud hosting platform — application compute (backend, frontend, marketing, workers), managed PostgreSQL database, Redis
subprocessors.dataProcessed: All user data, application data, database contents

subprocessors.name: Hetzner Online GmbH
subprocessors.purpose: S3-compatible object storage and internal administrative tooling (Grafana, observability infrastructure)
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User-uploaded files, internal metrics and observability data

subprocessors.name: Bunny CDN (BunnyWay d.o.o.)
subprocessors.purpose: Content delivery network for static assets and user-uploaded files
subprocessors.dataProcessed: Cached static assets, user-uploaded files, request metadata

subprocessors.name: Cloudflare, Inc.
subprocessors.purpose: DNS management, DDoS protection, traffic proxying

subprocessors.name: GitHub, Inc. (Microsoft)
subprocessors.purpose: OAuth authentication provider and GitHub App integration for linking repositories, syncing issues and pull requests, and posting comments
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User profile information, email address, authentication tokens, repository metadata, issue and pull request data, webhook payloads

subprocessors.name: Discord, Inc.
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User profile information, email address, authentication tokens

subprocessors.name: Slack Technologies (Salesforce, Inc.)
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User profile information, email address, authentication tokens

subprocessors.name: Doras (Doras Media Limited)
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User profile information, email address, authentication tokens

subprocessors.name: Polar Software Inc.
subprocessors.dataProcessed: Billing information, payment details, email addresses

subprocessors.name: PostHog, Inc. (EU)
subprocessors.dataProcessed: Usage events, anonymized user behavior data

subprocessors.name: Axiom, Inc.
subprocessors.dataProcessed: Application logs, which may contain user identifiers and request metadata

subprocessors.name: ClickHouse, Inc.
subprocessors.purpose: Analytics event store — captures platform events and aggregate metrics for internal reporting
subprocessors.dataProcessed: User IDs, organisation IDs, event types and timestamps, aggregate platform metrics
